params.name: Vaucanson Robot
params.description:
On Jul 16, 1774 AD, Swiss watchmaker Jaquet Droz created three incredibly intricate automata!
The automata made by Jaquet Droz consist of thousands of mechanical parts that can move through a gear system, not only writing beautiful calligraphy and drawing pictures but also playing wonderful music. The entire automaton's power comes entirely from its internal mechanics, requiring no external power source, and still works to this day!
